$schema: Tracks deployed realm versions per network. Updated after each realm deployment. Deployed-state claims (blocks, txHashes, ACL notes) are verified against the live chain — never from prose. See docs/planning/MEMBA_AAA_IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md §3.1 / G5.
verifiedDuring: AAA-1 G5 ledger overhaul. txHashes recovered from chain (base64(sha256(txbytes)) of the deploy tx at each recorded block) and confirmed against the previously-truncated values; nft_market's block corrected (237929 → 237926, the recorded block held no tx); ACL notes re-derived from live `vm/qfile` source. test12 realm SOURCE is hardened but NOT redeployed since the Phase B v2 batch (2026-04-09, multisig seq 57-61) — the on-chain bytecode is unchanged. gnoland1 remains empty pending betanet activation.
verificationMethod: Per realm: `vm/qfile <pkgpath>` for live source + ACL guard counts; `/block?height=<block>` for the deploy tx, hashed as base64(sha256(txbytes)).
pendingFields: Per-entry deployer commit SHA + gno toolchain commit are NOT yet pinned (deploy-time git/build metadata is not recoverable from chain) — tracked under E10 / decision Q2 (F10.1 scrub). samcrew-deployer is the canonical realm source.

memba_dao_candidature.note: v2 security fix. ACL VERIFIED on live source (2026-06-15): 7 guard sites (4 assertCallerIsOwner, 3 assertCallerIsAdmin).

memba_dao_channels.note: CORRECTION (G5, 2026-06-15): the prior 'zero ACL on all write functions' note was FALSE. Live `vm/qfile` source (778 lines) has 18 ACL guard sites: 4 assertCallerHasWriteAccess, 6 assertCallerIsOwner, 4 assertCallerIsAdminRole, 4 assertCallerIsMember. No emergency redeploy needed (see §3.1).

tokenfactory.note: Realm code not in the samcrew-deployer repo — deployed externally; block/txHash unrecorded.

agent_registry.note: CONFIRMED (G5, 2026-06-15): UseCredit(cur realm, agentId, userAddr) has NO caller guard on the live source — anyone can burn any user's credits. Hardened source ready; awaiting redeploy (A5). Credits UI gated off for test12 in config.ts until then.

nft_market.note: Block corrected 237929 → 237926 (G5: the recorded block held no tx; the deploy is at 237926). BuyNFT missing TransferFrom — feature-gated off.
